title: chrysochlamys micrantha
intro: Chrysochlamys micrantha, also known as the Small-flowered Chrysoclamis or Yellow Leaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Chrysochlamys micrantha is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
